title: Sara Sara Saara Lyrics Vaagai Sooda Va Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Chinmayi
Song: Sara Sara Saara Kathu
Lyrics : Vairamuthu
Movie: Vaagai Sooda Va
Music Director : M Ghibran

[Sara Sara Saara Kathu veesum podhum 
sir ah paarthu pesum podhum
sarapaambu pola nenju satham poduthey] (2)

[Ithu Ithu, Ithu poana nenju thaika
Otha paarva paarthu selu motha sotha
Eluthi thaaren moochu utpada ](2)

Sara Sara Saara Kathu veesum podhum 
sir ah paarthu pesum podhum
sarapaambu pola nenju satham poduthey

Enga ooru pidikutha ?, Enga thaani inikutha ?
Suthi varum kaathula, suttu irul madakutha
Mutta kozhi pudikava, moonu padi samaikava
Elumbathu kadikayil, enna konjam ninaikava
Kammanj soru rusikava, samacha kaiya konjam rasikava
Modakathan rasam vachi, madakathaan paakuren
Retta dhosa suttu vachi, Kaava kaakuren

Mukkanna nongu thaan vekkiren
Mandu Nee kagayen ketkura

Sara Sara Saara Kathu veesum podhum 
sir ah paarthu pesum podhum
sarapaambu pola nenju satham poduthey

Pullu kattu vaasama, buthi kulla veesura
Maatu mani sathama, mansakul ketkura
kattavandi oattura, kaiyalavu manasula 
Kaiyaeluthu podura kanni ponnu marbula
Moonu naala paakala, ooril endha poovum pookala
Aatu kallu kuliyila urangi povoam poonayai
Thanna vandhu parthuthan kirangi porenya

Meenuku aengura kokku nee....
Kothave theriyala makku nee.

Sara Sara Saara Kathu veesum podhum  ...
Ithu Ithu, Ithu poana nenju thaika ...

Kaatu malligai poothiriukuthu kadhala kadhala
Vandhu vandhu oadipogum vandukena kaaichala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sara Sara Saara?

The song conveys feelings of love and longing, encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Vaagai Sooda Va.

What is the plot context of Vaagai Sooda Va?

The movie revolves around themes of love, aspiration, and the struggles of rural life, making the song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who is the singer of Sara Sara Saara?

The song is beautifully sung by Chinmayi, known for her soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for Vaagai Sooda Va?

The music for the film was composed by M Ghibran, who is celebrated for his innovative musical style.

When was Sara Sara Saara released?

The song was released on July 2, 2011, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sara Sara Saara, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and yearning, set against the backdrop of the film Vaagai Sooda Va. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu evoke a sense of nostalgia and romance. Chinmayi's captivating voice brings the lyrics to life, making it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. Overall, the song beautifully encapsulates the essence of longing and affection, enhancing the film's emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sara Sara Saara from Vaagai Sooda Va is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Chinmayi's enchanting vocals and Vairamuthu's poetic lyrics, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of M Ghibran's composition that beautifully intertwines emotions and music.
stanzaMeanings: When the breeze blows, it feels like a snake's heart is making a sound, just like when you speak and look at someone.
This, this, when the heart goes, it looks at everything and moves around. I will write everything down and create a scene.
Tea... like you... what is my pain...
When the breeze blows, it feels like a snake's heart is making a sound, just like when you speak and look at someone.

Where is our place? Where is our uniqueness today? In the surrounding air, darkness is swirling. If you want to catch a hen, you need to cook it in three steps. In the hard work, think a little. The food is tasty, enjoy it a bit. I am watching the spicy soup, and I am looking at the crispy dosa.
I am placing the noni fruit. You are listening to the sound of the drum.
When the breeze blows, it feels like a snake's heart is making a sound, just like when you speak and look at someone.

The grass is blowing in the wind, and the sound is coming from the drum. The cart is moving, and the people are listening. The heart is writing down the feelings of the young girl. For three days, no flowers bloomed in the village. We will sleep in the stone bed, and the flower will come and see us, and it will shine.
You are the fish that is swimming... you don't know the pain of the people.
When the breeze blows, it feels like a snake's heart is making a sound... This, this, when the heart goes...
Tea... like you... what is my pain...
The jasmine flower is blooming in the wind, love, love. It comes and goes, and it seems to be running away.
